evidence: The text 'AUTO POSTO TREVIZAN II' identifies a specific gas station found in Mandaguaçu, Paraná.
The phone number '(44) 3013-9770' on the 'SEMINOVOS HUNGARO' vehicle uses the (44) area code, which serves the Maringá and northwestern region of the state of Paraná, Brazil.
Hungaro is a prominent logistics and transport company (Transportes Hungaro) headquartered in Maringá, Paraná.
The mention of 'coniferous trees' (likely Araucaria angustifolia) is consistent with the flora of the state of Paraná and the Southern Region of Brazil.
The Portuguese text 'AUTO POSTO' and 'COMBUSTIVEL DE QUALIDADE' confirms the location is in Brazil.
